title: RBSE 10th Result declared highlights: Rajasthan school board results declared, overall pass percentages above 94%
description: RBSE 10th Result declared: The results for the RBSE board class 10 have been announced. The results are available on the RBSE website and the HT Portal. Jhunjhunu district has secured the top spot in the list of highest pass percentage, with a percentage of 97.77%.
